text: Wolves were spotted near {location}.
Wolves tore into the herds of {location} — meat is getting scarce.
Bandits were seen camping on the roads near {location}.
A supply caravan bound for {location} was raided on the road.
A traveling merchant arrived in {location}.
A traveling merchant left {location}.
The farmers of {location} brought in a harvest.
Hunters returned to {location} with full sledges.
The catch at {location} was unusually rich this week.
A sickness is going around in {location} — remedies sell out fast.
A wedding feast emptied half the larders of {location}.
{location} celebrated a small feast day.
A brawl broke out in the tavern of {location}.
Tools went missing in {location} — folk suspect a thief.
The forge of {location} ran hot all week — blades pile up.
A traveling healer passed through {location}, selling tonics.
Strange lights were seen outside {location} at night.
Heavy rains turned the roads around {location} to mud.
A newcomer family settled down in {location}.
The old well of {location} ran dry; folk haul water from the stream.
A cold snap has folk in {location} burning through their stores.
